Privacy Policy for ဓမ္မ အရသာ

Last updated: April 22, 2026

This Privacy Policy applies to the Android app ဓမ္မ အရသာ (package: com.sam.krish.buddhismandmeditation) published on Google Play by Sam Krish.

Data We Collect

  • App may use third-party SDKs such as Google AdMob / Google Play services.
  • These SDKs may collect limited device and advertising data (for example: device identifiers, diagnostics, crash/performance data) to provide ads, security, and app functionality.
  • We do not sell personal data.

How We Use Data

  • Provide and improve app features.
  • Show ads (AdMob).
  • Diagnose crashes and performance issues.

Data Retention

  • Data stored locally on your device remains until you delete app data or uninstall app.
  • If third-party SDK providers collect data, retention is handled by those providers under their own policies.
  • If we receive support emails/messages, we retain them for up to 12 months (or shorter if no longer needed), then delete.

Data Deletion

You can delete locally stored app data anytime by:

  1. Uninstalling app, or
  2. Android Settings > Apps > ဓမ္မ အရသာ > Storage > Clear Data.
  • For deletion requests related to support communications, contact: suntosemyanmar@gmail.com
  • We process deletion requests within 30 days.

Third-Party Services

  • Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy
  • AdMob: https://support.google.com/admob/answer/6128543

Children’s Privacy

App not directed to children under 13 (or applicable minimum age in your region).
